recommendations.title: A Better Life
recommendations.overview: A gardener in East L.A. struggles to keep his son away from gangs and immigration agents while traveling across town to perform landscaping work for the city's wealthy landowners.

recommendations.title: Down to Earth
recommendations.overview: Struggling comic Lance Barton knows what it's like to die on stage. But when his life takes an unexpected turn - straight to heaven - Lance is sure there's been a mistake. Miraculously, he's right! An angel tells Lance he was taken prematurely but as

recommendations.title: Fatherhood
recommendations.overview: A widowed new dad copes with doubts, fears, heartache and dirty diapers as he sets out to raise his daughter on his own. Inspired by a true story.

recommendations.title: Moving On
recommendations.overview: Two old friends reconnect at their friend's funeral, and decide to exact revenge on the widower who wronged all three of them decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Operation Finale
recommendations.overview: In 1960, a team of Israeli secret agents is deployed to find Adolf Eichmann, the infamous Nazi architect of the Holocaust, supposedly hidden in Argentina, and get him to Israel to be judged.

recommendations.title: Cirque du Freak: The Vampire's Assistant
recommendations.overview: When Darren Shan is taken to a circus that's chock-full of sideshow oddities, he meets a vampire and receives a life-changing bite on the neck.

recommendations.title: Afraid

recommendations.title: American Pie

recommendations.title: Grandma

recommendations.title: Admission
